transcript.clean_text: stage one of the 2019 tour of a man from Ala Beach to a new finish in Su Kish a stage of 1382 km the pelaton starting under blazing Skies 27° centigrade and immediately from the start a breakaway group of riders forming in the Breakaway Alexis Gan of Delco Rodriguez of usadi planket of sport vandren and riding his 10th race in a man mik Shar as the Riders race past the impressive Sultan kaboo mosque the first Sprint point taken by Garen of Delco the peleton letting the Breakaway go but starting to close in fast Mel Shar one of only two Riders to have ridden all 10 editions of the tour of Aman alongside Alexander Kristoff onto the second Sprint and a Furious one with Shaw closing in fast against the sport vandren Rider planket the Sprint taken by the CCC Rider Direct Energy throwing all their might behind their Sprinter bonario the quartet trying to hold off the might of the sprinters teams and disappointment for Andre GLE with 5 km to go the trio remains at the front they say Well done it's been a good day in the saddle but now it's all about the sprinters 1300 M of straight road with a tailwind and bursting out of the peleton the big Norwegian Alexander Kristoff card closing fast bani there but the win to Alexander Kristoff a record-breaking Victory all smiles from Alexander Kristoff ahead of coard and buan and the red jersey will be worn by him on stage two with a 4 second advantage
